title: indigofera dillwynioides
intro: Indigofera dillwynioides, also known as the Hawaiian indigo plant, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Indigofera dillwynioides include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support skin health and reduce the appearance of scars.
